pr.title: PR2A: Reminder topic preferences (foundation)
pr.rollback: Revert the PR. If the database update was applied, your team can remove the new reminder preference table (this deletes saved rows).

receipt.goal: PR2A: Clean reminder preference rows per user per topic; email toggles on /family#reminders; push UI placeholder; no old reminder flags.
verification_steps: Toggle Monthly stage updates and Move-it-on prompts Email on/off; refresh — state matches
Push switches stay off with helper text; push section shows status placeholder
receipt.rollback_plan: Revert the PR; optionally drop the new table if the database update was applied.
